flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Messiah University rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.3k → $26.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Messiah University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.4k → $42.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Messiah University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
